title: ponerorchis luteola
intro: Ponerorchis luteola, also known as the Golden Ponerorchis or Ponerorchis luteola, is a type of orchid species belonging to the Ponerorchis genus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Ponerorchis luteola include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Ponerorchis luteola, including infusions and decoctions, have been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
